creator: cyberxgaming0@gmail.com
text:
LAN not working is one of the normal Windows issues for Minecraft. In many situations, the players can interface with the web yet they can't join each other to play the game. Assuming you run into this issue, sit back and relax. You can fix it by using this guide given below.
 
https://cyberxgaming.com/minecraft-lan-not-working/


If it does not help try contacting the minecraft server.
